packageRules.description: SDK bumps change the credentialed trust boundary and require the upgrade runbook.
prBodyNotes: Zscaler SDK bumps require docs/DEPENDENCY_POLICY.md#sdk-upgrade-runbook before merge.
Do not combine this SDK bump with new resources unless the review explicitly covers both changes.

packageRules.description: Keep GitHub Actions SHA-pinned; inline version comments allow Renovate to update the digest.
Group low-risk Go dependency updates, excluding the Zscaler SDK boundary package.

tools/ is intentionally unvendored (the release workflow installs cyclonedx-gomod via go install, verified by tools/go.sum). gomodSkipVendor stops Renovate from auto-detecting the root vendor directory as a parent and creating a spurious tools/vendor. Note: packageRules concat-merge postUpdateOptions, so the global list must not contain gomodVendor (root vendoring still happens via vendor/modules.txt auto-detection).
